reviews.quote: The birthday cake I ordered was absolutely stunning and tasted even better than it looked. My daughter was thrilled!
reviews.author: Sarah M.

reviews.quote: I stop in every Tuesday for a croissant and lavender latte. Best bakery in Maplewood, hands down.
reviews.author: James T.

reviews.quote: Their sourdough bread is the real deal. I haven't bought bread from the grocery store since I discovered Sweet Crumb.
reviews.author: Linda R.
